raw_sql:
SELECT ct.kind, COUNT(*) as company_count
FROM company_type ct
GROUP BY ct.kind, ct.id
ORDER BY ct.id;

SELECT cn.id, cn.name, cn.country_code, COUNT(mc.movie_id) as film_count
FROM company_name cn
JOIN movie_companies mc ON cn.id = mc.company_id
JOIN company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
WHERE ct.kind = 'production companies'
GROUP BY cn.id, cn.name, cn.country_code
HAVING COUNT(mc.movie_id) >= 20
ORDER BY film_count DESC
LIMIT 30;

WITH ranked_companies AS (
  SELECT cn.id, cn.name, cn.country_code, COUNT(mc.movie_id) as film_count,
         RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(mc.movie_id) DESC) as rnk
  FROM company_name cn
  JOIN movie_companies mc ON cn.id = mc.company_id
  JOIN company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
  WHERE ct.kind = 'production companies'
  GROUP BY cn.id, cn.name, cn.country_code
  HAVING COUNT(mc.movie_id) >= 20
)
SELECT id, name, country_code, film_count, rnk
FROM ranked_companies
WHERE rnk > 10
  AND film_count BETWEEN 40 AND 200
  AND country_code IN ('[us]', '[gb]', '[ca]', '[au]', '[ie]')
  AND name NOT ILIKE '%television%'
  AND name NOT ILIKE '%broadcasting%'
  AND name NOT ILIKE '%network%'
  AND name NOT ILIKE '%TV%'
  AND name NOT ILIKE '%films%' = FALSE
ORDER BY film_count DESC
LIMIT 40;

predicates: ((ranked_companies.rnk > 10) AND (ranked_companies.film_count >= 40) AND (ranked_companies.film_count <= 200) AND (ranked_companies.name !~~* '%television%'::text) AND (ranked_companies.name !~~* '%broadcasting%'::text) AND (ranked_companies.name !~~* '%network%'::text) AND (ranked_companies.name !~~* '%TV%'::text) AND (ranked_companies.name ~~* '%films%'::text) AND ((ranked_companies.country_code)::text = ANY ('{[us],[gb],[ca],[au],[ie]}'::text[])))

raw_sql:
SELECT cn.name, kt.kind, COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM company_name cn
JOIN movie_companies mc ON cn.id = mc.company_id
JOIN company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
JOIN title t ON mc.movie_id = t.id
JOIN kind_type kt ON t.kind_id = kt.id
WHERE ct.kind = 'production companies'
  AND cn.id IN (17693, 15275, 15974, 10539, 2415)
GROUP BY cn.name, kt.kind
ORDER BY cn.name, cnt DESC;

SELECT cn.name, mi.info as genre, COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM company_name cn
JOIN movie_companies mc ON cn.id = mc.company_id
JOIN company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
JOIN title t ON mc.movie_id = t.id
JOIN movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
JOIN info_type it ON mi.info_type_id = it.id
WHERE ct.kind = 'production companies'
  AND cn.id IN (17693, 15275, 15974, 10539)
  AND it.info = 'genres'
  AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
GROUP BY cn.name, mi.info
ORDER BY cn.name, cnt DESC;

SELECT cn.name, 
       COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) as film_count,
       ROUND(AVG(mii.info::numeric), 2) as avg_rating,
       MIN(mii.info::numeric) as min_rating,
       MAX(mii.info::numeric) as max_rating
FROM company_name cn
JOIN movie_companies mc ON cn.id = mc.company_id
JOIN company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
JOIN title t ON mc.movie_id = t.id
JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON t.id = mii.movie_id
JOIN info_type it ON mii.info_type_id = it.id
WHERE ct.kind = 'production companies'
  AND cn.id IN (17693, 15275, 15974, 10539)
  AND it.info = 'rating'
  AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
GROUP BY cn.name
ORDER BY avg_rating DESC;

SELECT cn.name,
       (t.production_year / 10) * 10 AS decade,
       COUNT(*) AS film_count
FROM company_name cn
JOIN movie_companies mc ON cn.id = mc.company_id
JOIN company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
JOIN title t ON mc.movie_id = t.id
WHERE ct.kind = 'production companies'
  AND cn.id IN (10539, 15275, 15974)
  AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
  AND t.production_year IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY cn.name, decade
ORDER BY cn.name, decade;

SELECT cn.name,
       n.gender,
       COUNT(DISTINCT ci.person_id) as unique_actors,
       COUNT(*) as total_credits
FROM company_name cn
JOIN movie_companies mc ON cn.id = mc.company_id
JOIN company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
JOIN title t ON mc.movie_id = t.id
JOIN cast_info ci ON t.id = ci.movie_id
JOIN name n ON ci.person_id = n.id
JOIN role_type rt ON ci.role_id = rt.id
WHERE ct.kind = 'production companies'
  AND cn.id IN (10539, 15275, 15974)
  AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
  AND rt.role IN ('actor', 'actress')
  AND n.gender IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY cn.name, n.gender
ORDER BY cn.name, n.gender;

SELECT cn.name,
       n.name as director,
       COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) as films_directed
FROM company_name cn
JOIN movie_companies mc ON cn.id = mc.company_id
JOIN company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
JOIN title t ON mc.movie_id = t.id
JOIN cast_info ci ON t.id = ci.movie_id
JOIN name n ON ci.person_id = n.id
JOIN role_type rt ON ci.role_id = rt.id
WHERE ct.kind = 'production companies'
  AND cn.id IN (10539, 15275, 15974)
  AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
  AND rt.role = 'director'
GROUP BY cn.name, n.name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) >= 3
ORDER BY cn.name, films_directed DESC;

SELECT cn.name, t.title, t.production_year, mii.info::numeric as rating
FROM company_name cn
JOIN movie_companies mc ON cn.id = mc.company_id
JOIN company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
JOIN title t ON mc.movie_id = t.id
JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON t.id = mii.movie_id
JOIN info_type it ON mii.info_type_id = it.id
WHERE ct.kind = 'production companies'
  AND cn.id IN (10539, 15275, 15974)
  AND it.info = 'rating'
  AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
  AND mii.info::numeric >= 6.5
ORDER BY cn.name, mii.info::numeric DESC
LIMIT 30;
error_msg: invalid input syntax for type numeric: "2.12..11.3"

raw_sql:
SELECT cn.name, t.title, t.production_year, mii.info as rating
FROM company_name cn
JOIN movie_companies mc ON cn.id = mc.company_id
JOIN company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
JOIN title t ON mc.movie_id = t.id
JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON t.id = mii.movie_id
JOIN info_type it ON mii.info_type_id = it.id
WHERE ct.kind = 'production companies'
  AND cn.id IN (10539, 15275, 15974)
  AND it.info = 'rating'
  AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
  AND mii.info ~ '^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$'
  AND mii.info::numeric >= 6.5
ORDER BY cn.name, mii.info::numeric DESC
LIMIT 30;

SELECT cn.name, t.title, t.production_year, mii.info as rating
FROM company_name cn
JOIN movie_companies mc ON cn.id = mc.company_id
JOIN company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
JOIN title t ON mc.movie_id = t.id
JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON t.id = mii.movie_id
JOIN info_type it ON mii.info_type_id = it.id
WHERE ct.kind = 'production companies'
  AND cn.id = 15974
  AND it.info = 'rating'
  AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
  AND mii.info ~ '^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$'
ORDER BY mii.info::numeric DESC
LIMIT 15;

SELECT mi.info as genre, COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM company_name cn
JOIN movie_companies mc ON cn.id = mc.company_id
JOIN company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
JOIN title t ON mc.movie_id = t.id
JOIN movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
JOIN info_type it ON mi.info_type_id = it.id
WHERE ct.kind = 'production companies'
  AND cn.id = 15974
  AND it.info = 'genres'
  AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
GROUP BY mi.info
ORDER BY cnt DESC;
